text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It seems we're both running today,<n>Fukukitaru.
Um... Good luck.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And that, everyone, was my<n>impression of the me
from last<n>year—a scaredy cat. Now, behold, the
very picture of composure!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Heaven never ceases to smile upon<n>me! I'm sure
you witnessed the full<n>effects during the Kikuka
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You say you've seen the other side<n>of speed,
Suzuka? Hehehe! Wait till<n>you get a load of me...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
With my almighty luck, I've breached<n>the heavens
to see the gods<n>themselves!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Today will be a battle for the books.<n>Divine Luck
versus the Speed Star.<n>However...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm cool as a cucumber. With the<n>heavens
blessing my every step,<n>winning this race will be a
walk in the<n>park.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka looks at me out of the<n>corner of
her eye.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She's probably... not okay. Ever since<n>the Kikuka
Sho, she's been relying<n>more and more on luck
and divine<n>protection, and...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She has an especially strange look in<n>her eyes
today. I have a bad feeling<n>about this.
